# miDash

> Q's personal command center — a single-page dashboard linking calendar, mail, work,
> projects, kids, and play, plus an embedded AI chat agent. This file tells AI agents
> and crawlers what the site is and how to interact with it.

## About

miDash is a static, single-file dashboard (`index.html`) hosted on GitHub Pages.
It is a personal launchpad: curated quick-links grouped into sections, a live clock,
and a chat widget that talks to a private backend (owner's Raspberry Pi or a
Cloudflare Worker) holding the Anthropic API key. No secrets live in the public page.

## Sections

- Calendar: Google Calendar links (today, agenda, new event)
- Mail: Gmail (inbox, starred, compose)
- Work: Google Drive, QuickBooks, Docs
- Projects: GitHub, this repo, notes
- Kids: family calendar, photos, school portal
- Fun & Play: YouTube, Spotify, Maps

## Agent interface

The dashboard includes a chat agent. Agents and integrations can interact with it via
the configured backend endpoint (see `CONFIG.chatEndpoint` in `index.html`).

- Method: POST
- Body: `{ "messages": [ { "role": "user", "content": "..." } ] }`
- Response: `{ "reply": "..." }` (Anthropic-style `{ "content": [{ "text": "..." }] }` is also accepted)

The same endpoint can be reached by other clients the owner runs (e.g. a Raspberry Pi
service exposed to Discord), enabling one shared agent across surfaces.

## Files

- [index.html](index.html): the dashboard itself
- [worker.js](worker.js): Cloudflare Worker proxy that holds the API key
- [server.js](server.js): Node/Raspberry Pi proxy alternative
- [README.md](README.md): setup and deployment

## Notes for crawlers

This is a personal site. It contains no tracking and no private data in the markup —
all personal data stays behind the owner's authenticated services and the private
chat backend.
